standalone-blockquote.name: Component

stories.name: Blockquote
stories.snippet:
const Blockquote = () => <Component>(<>
      <Text size="standard">This is a paragraph.</Text>
      <List size="standard">
        <Text size="standard">This is a bullet point.</Text>
      </List>
    </>)</Component>;

standalone-blockquote.import:
import { Blockquote as Component } from "scoobie";
import { List, Text } from "braid-design-system";

stories.name: Single
Multi
Bash
Csharp
Diff
stories.snippet:
const Diff = () => <Component
    graphqlPlayground="https://manage.developer.seek.com/graphql-explorer"
    initialIndex={0}
    language="diff"
    trim>--- a/oldfile
    +++ b/newfile
    @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
    -Hello, World!
    +Goodbye, World!
</Component>;

stories.name: Graph Ql
Html
stories.snippet:
const Html = () =>

Hello, World!

;

stories.name: Http
stories.snippet:
const Http = () => <Component
    graphqlPlayground="https://manage.developer.seek.com/graphql-explorer"
    initialIndex={0}
    language="http"
    trim>GET / HTTP/1.1
    Host: example.com

</Component>;

stories.name: Java
Javascript
Json
Jsonc
JSX
Kotlin
Php
Python
Shell
Sql
Swift
Splunk Spl
stories.snippet:
const SplunkSpl = () => <Component
    graphqlPlayground="https://manage.developer.seek.com/graphql-explorer"
    initialIndex={0}
    language="splunk-spl"
    trim>index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd
    | stats count by component
</Component>;

stories.name: XML
stories.snippet:
const XML = () => <Component
    graphqlPlayground="https://manage.developer.seek.com/graphql-explorer"
    initialIndex={0}
    language="xml"
    trim><xml>
      <message>Hello, World!</message>
    </xml>
</Component>;

stories.name: No Line Numbers
stories.snippet: const NoLineNumbers = () => <Component code="query {\n  version\n}" language="graphql" />;

stories.name: Line Numbers
stories.snippet: const LineNumbers = () => <Component code="query {\n  version\n}" language="graphql" lineNumbers />;

standalone-codethemeprovider.name: Component

stories.name: Scoobie Dark
stories.snippet: const ScoobieDark = () => <Component theme="scoobieDark">{children}</Component>;

stories.name: Scoobie Light
stories.snippet: const ScoobieLight = () => <Component theme="scoobieLight">{children}</Component>;

standalone-codethemeprovider.import:
import { CodeContainer, CodeThemeProvider as Component } from "scoobie";
import { Stack } from "braid-design-system";

theme.description:
The current code theme.

This defaults to `scoobieLight` in the absence of a `CodeThemeProvider`.

stories.name: Copyable Text

standalone-inlinecode.name: InlineCodeComponent

stories.name: Inline Code
stories.snippet: const InlineCode = () => <InlineCodeComponent>inline code</InlineCodeComponent>;

stories.name: In A Long Sentence
stories.snippet: const InALongSentence = () => <InlineCodeComponent>inline code</InlineCodeComponent>;

stories.name: Weak
stories.snippet: const Weak = () => <InlineCodeComponent weight="weak">weak inline code</InlineCodeComponent>;

stories.name: Color
stories.snippet: const Color = () => <InlineCodeComponent>#abc012</InlineCodeComponent>;

stories.name: Width Constrained
stories.snippet: const WidthConstrained = () => <InlineCodeComponent>a very long inline code sentence which wraps</InlineCodeComponent>;

stories.name: Width Constrained Weak
stories.snippet: const WidthConstrainedWeak = () => <InlineCodeComponent weight="weak">a very long weak inline code sentence which wraps</InlineCodeComponent>;

stories.name: Width Constrained With Unwrappable Contents
stories.snippet: const WidthConstrainedWithUnwrappableContents = () => <InlineCodeComponent>veryveryveryveryveryveryveryveryveryverylonginlinecodesentencewhichwraps</InlineCodeComponent>;

standalone-inlinecode.import:
import { Box, Text } from "braid-design-system";
import { InlineCode as InlineCodeComponent } from "scoobie";
